Facebook Twitter Linkedin Pinterest

HYDRAULIC EXPANSION POWERPACK - HEP 500 High torque machine suitable for expanding large diameter and thick wall tubes. Best suitable for the tubes in boiler range. Very compact hence very easy and comfortable to use inside the boiler drum. KNOW MORE DIGITAL TORQUE CONTROLLER MODEL DTA-15 Fully solid state with Digital Display. No Moving parts like relay or contactors, So less wear and tear and long life. Working satisfactory in market since last 10 years with very successful market report. Superior SCR technology used over Triacs for controlling the high voltage drives. KNOW MORE DIGITAL TORQUE CONTROLLER MODEL DTW-15 Fully Solid State Design – No noise – Long life. Separate Program & Power circuit board for easy maintenance. Advance micro-controller chip for control functions. Accurately calibrated torque settings with a resolution of 1 watt facilities easy setting reproduction of identical results. KNOW MORE ELECTRIC TUBE EXPANSION MODEL DRIVE EDB-1 Heavy Duty and light weight drives. Continuous duty cycle. Less sparking of carbon brush under load condition increases the life of carbon brushes and armatures. KNOW MORE ELECTRIC TUBE EXPANSION MODEL DRIVE EDB-3 Heavy Duty and light weight drives. Continuous duty cycle. Less sparking of carbon brush under load condition increases the life of carbon brushes and armatures. KNOW MORE BRUSHES & CUTTERS
FOR TUBE CLEANING Heavy Duty and light weight drives. Continuous duty cycle. Less sparking of carbon brush under load condition increases the life of carbon brushes and armatures. KNOW MORE

Are you looking for a reputable & quality engineers?

Contact Us

WHAT WE OFFER

Our Key Products

TUBE INSTALLATION

Our company’s name figures in the list of renowned Manufacturers, Suppliers and Exporters of Tube Installation Equipment from Maharashtra.

READ MORE

TUBE REMOVAL

Owing to our rich industry experience, we are enlisted among the successful Manufacturer, Supplier and Exporter of Tube Removal Tools from Maharashtra.

READ MORE

TUBE CLEANING

We are a well-established manufacturer of tube cleaning equipment, tube cleaning machine, dry tub cleaning equipments.

READ MORE

WHY CHOOSE US

INDUSTRY EXPERIENCE

More than 10 Years of work experience in designing, manufacturing & marketing various Heavy duty industrial tools & equipment

ISO CERTIFICATIONS

DBX Tools is awarded with ISO 9001:2008 certification for strictly following the quality norms and processes.

TAILORED SOLUTIONS

Backed by our manufacturing unit, we are capable of offering individually tailored solutions for our valuable customers.

ISO CERTIFICATIONS

DBX Tools is awarded with ISO 9001:2008 certification for strictly following the quality norms and processes.

TAILORED SOLUTIONS

Backed by our manufacturing unit, we are capable of offering individually tailored solutions for our valuable customers.

HIGH QUALITY

A reliable & strict quality checking process is followed to maintain the quality level of our products.

DEDICATED TEAM

A team of dedicated and reliable professionals has led our company to an unmatched level of success and growth.

ADVANCED MACHINERIES

We have set up an manufacturing facility fully-equipped with the latest Testing and assembly machinery with advance technologies.

ABOUT US

WELCOME TO DH BOILER EXCHANGER TOOLS PVT. LTD.

DH Boiler Exchanger Tools Pvt. Ltd. was established in the year 2013 in Mumbai (Maharashtra). Over the years, we have won over numerous clients with our exemplary after sales support and right pricing policy..

Read More About Us
